parameters.subject: =Action Required: Food Safety Compliance for {{ $json.brandName }} (Sam's Club Roadshow)
parameters.message:
=

Phase 2: Food Safety Compliance & Risk Readiness

Congratulations on advancing, {{ $json.brandName }}! As a food/supplement product, Sam's Club requires specific food safety documentation before scheduling any roadshow events.

Important: Fresh produce, eggs, raw seafood (including sushi) and raw meat products are NOT permitted for Sam's Club Roadshow or In-Store Demo purposes.

Risk Classification: {{ $json.foodRiskLevel }} Risk

{{ $json.foodRiskLevel === 'Low' ? 'Low Risk: Shelf-stable, pre-packaged items served in original packaging. Handwashing station required if items are opened/repackaged.' : $json.foodRiskLevel === 'Medium' ? 'Medium Risk: Items requiring reheating, cold/hot holding, or pre-cooked proteins. Requires: Handwashing station within 25 ft, Certified Food Safety Manager present at event.' : 'Your risk level will be determined during review.' }}

Required Documents ({{ $json.complianceChecklist.filter(i => i.required && i.status === 'pending').length }} items):

    {{ $json.complianceChecklist.filter(i => i.required && i.status === 'pending').map(i => '
  1. ' + i.item + '
    2. ').join('') }}

Key Food Safety Requirements:

  • Allergen Documentation: You must document all NINE major allergens (Peanuts, Wheat, Soybeans, Fish, Crustacean Shellfish, Tree Nuts, Milk, Eggs, Sesame) present in your demo product
  • Food Safety Manager: A certified food safety manager must be present at every event
  • Calibrated Thermometer: Required for any food requiring temperature control
  • No Unattended Food/Equipment: All food and equipment must be attended at all times during events
  • No Samples to Children: Samples shall never be given to children without parental/guardian consent
  • All vendor associates must be trained on Sam's Club Basic Food Safety High Five

Vendor Food Safety Questionnaire: Please complete and return the attached questionnaire covering vendor info, risk level, certifications, event details, product details, and food preparation procedures.

Target: Complete within 5 business days. Reply to this email with documents or upload to your brand folder.

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

parameters.subject: =Action Required: Product Testing & Compliance for {{ $json.brandName }} (Sam's Club C63 Roadshow)
parameters.message:
=

Phase 2: Product Testing & Compliance

Congratulations on advancing, {{ $json.brandName }}! Sam's Club C63 Roadshow products must meet Walmart Inc.'s Performance, Regulatory, Compliance and Claims testing requirements.

Risk Classification: {{ $json.gmfRiskLevel }} Risk

{{ $json.gmfRiskLevel === 'Low' ? 'Low Risk: Non-powered items (textile, plastic, glass, ceramic, metallic, wood, paper).' : $json.gmfRiskLevel === 'Medium' ? 'Medium Risk: Lithium-ion battery powered items, OTC products, consumables, wellness products, household care. WERCS registration required.' : 'Classification pending review.' }}

Note: Items powered by Natural Gas, Propane, or Gasoline are classified as Elevated High Risk and are NOT allowed for Roadshows / Pop-Up Shop events.

Required Documents ({{ $json.complianceChecklist.filter(i => i.required && i.status === 'pending').length }} items):

    {{ $json.complianceChecklist.filter(i => i.required && i.status === 'pending').map(i => '
  1. ' + i.item + '
    2. ').join('') }}

Approved Third-Party Test Labs (contact one to initiate C63 testing):

  • UL: rog.hardlinessalesforcecustomerservice@ul.com
  • SGS: james.dorsey@sgs.com
  • Intertek (ITS): jennifer.jenkins@intertek.com
  • Bureau Veritas (BV): ryan.deleon@bureauveritas.com

Testing Process:

  1. Contact an approved lab to initiate testing under C63 Roadshows (do not include other category numbers)
  2. Lab reviews product (photo or sample) to determine test sample requirements
  3. Lab selects testing protocols, determines costs and timeline
  4. If you have existing test reports from an ISO 17025 accredited lab dated within 12 months, you may submit those in lieu of new testing (DAL process)

Packaging Requirements:

  • C63 Merchant Team must approve all retail-ready packaging
  • Must follow Sam's Club structural packaging standards for PDQ display and/or pallet construction
  • Sam's Club FedEx ISTA6 transit testing may be required (confirm with lab)

Packaging Standards Reference: Sam's Club Structural Packaging Standards

Target: Complete within 5 business days. Reply to this email with documents or upload to your brand folder.

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

parameters.message:
=

Additional Documents Required

  • ' + g + '
    • ').join('') }}

Current compliance score: {{ $json.complianceScore }}% ({{ $json.totalReceived }}/{{ $json.totalRequired }} received)

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

meta.description: Stage 1 - Compliance & Risk Readiness. Classifies brand by risk level per Sam's Club 2025/2026 SOPs. Food brands get full food safety checklist (GFSI, health permits, food safety manager, allergen documentation, food prep SOPs, equipment lists). General merchandise brands get C63 product testing requirements (approved third-party labs: UL/SGS/ITS/BV, performance/regulatory/compliance testing, packaging standards). Routes to category-specific compliance email with complete requirements.
